arts.ttl: Former Chelsea, Manchester City winger Shaun Wright-Phillips reveals prediction for Premier League top four
arts.sum: Shaun Wright-Phillips - formerly of Chelsea and Manchester City - tells Sports Mole of his prediction for which of his former clubs will finish in the top four of the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Chelsea – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Brighton and Chelsea will pair up on Valentine’s Day as the two clubs meet in the Premier League this evening. It’s a quick second date after their meeting in the fifth round of the FA Cup just last weekend. The Seagulls came out on top at the Amex Stadium as Kaoru Mitoma dumped the visitor’s […] The post Brighton vs Chelsea – Match Preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea given £40m transfer green light as January interest reignited
arts.sum: Champions League football next season will come as a big boost, especially looking ahead to the summer transfer window . Chelsea will have to pay a fee of around £40 million to sign Ipswich striker Liam Delap in the summer, amid competition from the likes of Manchester City and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ex-Chelsea star says no chance Cole Palmer makes same decision he did
arts.sum: That said, Shaun Wright-Phillips - who, like Palmer, joined Chelsea from City in his early 20s - believes it would be "a mistake" for both the player and the club to part ways. "Even if Chelsea miss out on the Champions League, there's not a chance Cole Palmer leaves," the 43-year-old told BetVictor .
